---
title: "About Me"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/rsm-y7niu
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:y7niu@ucsd.edu
---

## Hi, I'm Yinkai 👋

I'm a Master's student in **Business Analytics** at the [Rady School of Management, UC San Diego](https://rady.ucsd.edu/).

I started out studying **Civil Engineering** at Kunming University of Science and Technology — building things that don't fall down teaches you to respect data and second-guess assumptions. Somewhere along the way I realized the questions I cared about most weren't structural: *which campaigns actually drive revenue? Which experiments are real, and which are noise?* That pulled me toward analytics, and eventually to Rady.

The throughline is the same: turning messy inputs into things people can stand on.

## What I work on

::: {.skill-tags}
[Marketing Analytics]{.tag} [Causal Inference]{.tag} [A/B Testing]{.tag} [Attribution]{.tag} [MMM]{.tag} [Data Engineering]{.tag} [ETL Pipelines]{.tag} [SQL]{.tag} [dbt]{.tag} [Python]{.tag} [R]{.tag}
:::

**Marketing Analytics** — Lift studies, holdout experiments, attribution, marketing mix modeling. The honest version of "did this campaign work?"

**Data Engineering** — None of the above works if the pipeline is held together with duct tape. I care about reproducible, well-tested workflows.

## Education

**UC San Diego — Rady School of Management**  
*MS in Business Analytics* · 2025–2026

**Kunming University of Science and Technology**  
*B.Eng in Civil Engineering*

## Outside of work

A non-exhaustive list of things I'd rather be doing on a Saturday:

::: {.skill-tags}
[🎮 PS5]{.tag} [🏋️ Lifting]{.tag} [🚙 Off-roading]{.tag} [⛺ Camping]{.tag} [🎬 Movies]{.tag} [☕ Philz Coffee]{.tag}
:::

If any of this — the work or the off-roading — overlaps with what you're into, [say hi](mailto:y7niu@ucsd.edu).
